title: helianthemum origanifolium subsp. molle
intro: Helianthemum origanifolium subsp. molle, also known as Rock Rose, is a plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Rock Rose include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Rock Rose can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
